## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

Minimal `.ivk` file that triggers the bug (if applicable):

```
@name ...

POST ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, console output (Ctrl+Shift+I → Console), or screenshots.

## Environment

- Invoker version: <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 -->
- Obsidian version: <!-- Settings → About -->
- OS: <!-- macOS 14 / Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- Installer version: <!-- Settings → About -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant.
